note: Every entry is a VERIFIED-INTENTIONAL exception, not a suppressed bug. The genuinely fixable findings were fixed (CSS tool false positives resolved upstream in the audit tool; events_retention_months + leaderboard_mode in PR #64; 12 engagement settings given admin UIs in PR #65). What remains is deferred-feature options, dynamic-key writes a static scanner provably cannot follow, and Action-Scheduler/WP-Cron hooks whose action name is a class constant the scanner resolves on the add_action (consume) side but not on the as_enqueue_async_action/as_schedule_*/wp_schedule_event (fire) side. Each cron/AS entry was confirmed 2026-06-15 to have a real firing call referencing the same constant in the same class. Re-verify each before extending. Better long-term fix: teach contract-audit to resolve constants passed to the as_*/wp_schedule_* family.

suppressions.reason: Deferred feature. ActivityPub federation is not shipped yet (src/Integrations/ActivityPub.php is gated/inactive). The option is read default-off; it gains a write path + admin UI when AP ships. Intentional code-only until then.
Deferred feature. Per-user ActivityPub opt-in meta, read default-off; no write/UI until ActivityPub federation ships. Pairs with wb_gam_activitypub_publish.

Feature kill-switch read with a functional default. FeatureFlags persists combined state under one option (FeatureFlags.php:156, OPTION_KEY); this individual key is code/filter-overridable by design, no per-key admin write intended.
Feature kill-switch read with a functional default. Same FeatureFlags combined-option design as wb_gam_feature_notifications_queue_v1; code/filter-overridable, no per-key admin write intended.
False positive. Written by SetupWizard via update_option($option_key) iterating a label=>key map (SetupWizard.php:341); the static scanner cannot resolve the variable key. The write site exists.

False positive. Written by PersonalRecordEngine via the dynamic key 'wb_gam_pr_best_' . $period (PersonalRecordEngine.php:115); the static scanner cannot match the concatenation. The write site exists.
Distinct data, not a dual key. Level display name vs numeric level id are different fields. Heuristic token-overlap false positive.
Distinct data, not a dual key. Current login streak vs all-time max streak are intentionally separate counters. Heuristic false positive.
Distinct data, not a dual key. Schema migration version vs capabilities/abilities version are independent counters. Heuristic false positive.

False positive (cron/AS). Fired via wp_schedule_event/as_* referencing self::CRON_HOOK='wb_gam_as_cleanup'; scanner resolves the constant on add_action but not on the firing call. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (Action Scheduler). Fired via as_enqueue_async_action(self::HOOK, ...) in AsyncEvaluator.php:130, HOOK='wb_gam_async_evaluate'. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (cron). Fired via wp_schedule_event(..., 'daily', self::COMPUTE_CRON), COMPUTE_CRON='wb_gam_compute_intelligence'. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (cron). Fired via wp_schedule_event(..., 'daily', self::PRUNE_CRON), PRUNE_CRON='wb_gam_notifications_queue_prune'. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (Action Scheduler). Single-user nudge scheduled via as_* with self::AS_SINGLE_HOOK='wb_gam_nudge_single_user' (LeaderboardNudge, group wb-gamification-nudge). Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (cron). Fired via wp_schedule_event(time(), self::CRON_RECUR, self::CRON_HOOK) in PointsExpiry.php:54, CRON_HOOK='wb_gam_points_decay'. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (cron). Fired via wp_schedule_event(..., 'hourly', self::RECONCILE_CRON), RECONCILE_CRON='wb_gam_reconcile_side_effects'. Verified 2026-06-15.

False positive (Action Scheduler). Fired via as_enqueue_async_action(self::AS_ACTION, ...) in WebhookDispatcher.php:261, AS_ACTION='wb_gam_send_webhook'. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (Action Scheduler). Retry scheduled via as_* with self::AS_RETRY_ACTION='wb_gam_webhook_retry' in WebhookDispatcher.php:492. Verified 2026-06-15.
False positive (Action Scheduler). Fired via as_enqueue_async_action(self::AS_HOOK, ...) in WeeklyEmailEngine.php:125, AS_HOOK='wb_gam_weekly_email_user'. Verified 2026-06-15.

False positive (cron). Fired via wp_schedule_event($next_sunday, 'weekly', self::CRON_PROCESS) in CohortEngine:110, CRON_PROCESS='wb_gam_cohort_process'. Verified 2026-06-15.

False positive. The wb-gam-hide-desktop class is emitted centrally by WBGam\Blocks\CSS::* (src/Blocks/CSS.php:173) for every block when the device-visibility flag is set, not hardcoded in redemption-store markup. Covered by CSSTest::test_visibility_classes_emit_when_flags_set. The scanner scopes per-block and misses the central emission. Verified 2026-06-15.

False positive. wb-gam-hide-tablet is emitted by WBGam\Blocks\CSS (src/Blocks/CSS.php:176) when the tablet-visibility flag is set; covered by CSSTest::test_visibility_classes_emit_when_flags_set. Scanner per-block scope misses the central emission. Verified 2026-06-15.

False positive. wb-gam-hide-mobile is emitted by WBGam\Blocks\CSS (src/Blocks/CSS.php:179) when the mobile-visibility flag is set; covered by CSSTest::test_visibility_classes_emit_when_flags_set. Scanner per-block scope misses the central emission. Verified 2026-06-15.
